title: NordVPN vs Surfshark: Premium vs Budget VPN — Which is Better in 2026?
description: Comparing NordVPN (best overall) against Surfshark (best value). Speed, security, streaming, and pricing analyzed to help you choose.

verdict.overallReasoning: NordVPN is the better overall VPN with a larger server network, faster speeds, and more advanced features like Threat Protection. However, Surfshark is the better value — at nearly half the price, it delivers 90% of NordVPN's performance with the unique advantage of unlimited device connections. Choose NordVPN for the best possible experience; choose Surfshark to save money without sacrificing essential protection.
